For a given payment year, the research risk score files include an Operational Payment Base File and Model Output Files (MOFs) from a mix of six potential risk models. The MOFs contain raw risk scores calculated prior to any adjustments made for payments. Each payment year has specific risk models that are based on that year’s risk adjustment methodology; payment years may use a blend of MOF
